attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
EX_COT.CREATED_BY  ,                  
EX_COT.CREATION_DATE ,                
EX_COT.EC_HEADER_ID,                  
EX_COT.EC_LINE_ID,                    
EX_COT.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
EX_COT.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
EX_COT.LAST_UPDATED_BY      ,         
EX_COT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  ,            
EX_COT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN   ,          
EX_COT.NOTES      ,                   
EX_COT.OBSOLETE_FLAG,                 
EX_COT.ORDER_TASK_ID ,                
EX_COT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE     ,
EX_COT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_SOURCE_NAME  , 
EX_COT.TASK_ID ,                      
EX_COT.TASK_STATUS_CODE  ,            
EX_COT.TASK_TEXT,                     
EX_COT.BATCH_ID,                      
EX_COT.CREATE_DATETIME   ,            
EX_COT.ACTION_CODE     ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM        
(
SELECT 
COT.CREATED_BY    ,               
COT.CREATION_DATE    ,             
COT.EC_HEADER_ID ,                 
COT.EC_LINE_ID  ,                  
COT.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,              
COT.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
COT.LAST_UPDATED_BY  ,             
COT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
COT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,             
COT.NOTES    ,                     
COT.OBSOLETE_FLAG    ,             
COT.ORDER_TASK_ID    ,             
COT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE  ,   
COT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_SOURCE_NAME ,  
COT.TASK_ID   ,                    
COT.TASK_STATUS_CODE  ,            
COT.TASK_TEXT,                     
COT.BATCH_ID  ,                    
COT.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
COT.ACTION_CODE   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS COT
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_HEADERS SOH 
WHERE COT.EC_HEADER_ID=SOH.EC_HEADER_ID 
AND COT.GLOBAL_NAME=SOH.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_TASKS SCT
WHERE COT.TASK_ID = SCT.TASK_ID AND 
COT.GLOBAL_NAME = SCT.GLOBAL_NAME)
UNION 
SELECT 
COT.CREATED_BY    ,               
COT.CREATION_DATE    ,             
COT.EC_HEADER_ID ,                 
COT.EC_LINE_ID  ,                  
COT.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,              
COT.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
COT.LAST_UPDATED_BY  ,             
COT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
COT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,             
COT.NOTES    ,                     
COT.OBSOLETE_FLAG    ,             
COT.ORDER_TASK_ID    ,             
COT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE  ,   
COT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_SOURCE_NAME ,  
COT.TASK_ID   ,                    
COT.TASK_STATUS_CODE  ,            
COT.TASK_TEXT,                     
COT.BATCH_ID  ,                    
COT.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
COT.ACTION_CODE   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS COT
INNER JOIN
	$$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_HEADERS COH
ON	COT.EC_HEADER_ID = COH.EC_HEADER_ID
	AND COT.GLOBAL_NAME = COH.GLOBAL_NAME
	WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE 
COH.ERP_HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND CASE WHEN COH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN COH.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END= NSOT.SS_CODE)
)EX_COT

SELECT 
EOCOT.CREATED_BY,                    
EOCOT.CREATION_DATE,                 
EOCOT.EC_HEADER_ID,                  
EOCOT.EC_LINE_ID,                    
EOCOT.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
EOCOT.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
EOCOT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
EOCOT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
EOCOT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,            
EOCOT.NOTES  ,                       
EOCOT.OBSOLETE_FLAG  ,               
EOCOT.ORDER_TASK_ID ,                
EOCOT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE ,    
EOCOT.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_SOURCE_NAME ,  
EOCOT.TASK_ID ,                      
EOCOT.TASK_STATUS_CODE,              
EOCOT.TASK_TEXT ,                    
EOCOT.BATCH_ID,                      
EOCOT.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
EOCOT.ACTION_CODE  
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS EOCOT WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS  COT   WHERE EOCOT.ORDER_TASK_ID= COT.ORDER_TASK_ID AND
EOCOT.GLOBAL_NAME = COT.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT 
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY STHDR_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,STHDR_BK.SS_CODE,STHDR_BK.SS_TABLE_CD)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,
STHDR_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
STHDR_BK.SS_CODE SS_CD,
STHDR_BK.SS_TABLE_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
COT.ORDER_TASK_ID SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE	,
'CEC' SS_TABLE_CD
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS COT  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=COT.GLOBAL_NAME 
)  STHDR_BK,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK ) SMHDR_MAX
WHERE  NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK SCS 
WHERE 	SCS.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT =STHDR_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT 
AND SCS.SS_CD =STHDR_BK.SS_CODE
AND SCS.SS_TABLE_CD='CEC'
)
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  
	(
	SELECT 
	ECCOT.ORDER_TASK_ID			SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
	ECCOT.GLOBAL_NAME				GLOBAL_NAME			
	FROM  
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS ECCOT  
	)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT =STHDR_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT  
	AND (CASE 
    		WHEN EXCEP_BK.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' 
    		WHEN EXCEP_BK.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' 
    END)= STHDR_BK.SS_CODE
	)

SELECT	
EOCH.ORDER_NUMBER,                  
EOCH.EC_HEADER_ID,                  
EOCH.GLOBAL_NAME,                   
EOCH.ERP_HEADER_ID,                 
EOCH.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
EOCH.CREATION_DATE,                 
EOCH.CREATED_BY ,                   
EOCH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
EOCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
EOCH.LOAD_CODE,             
EOCH.OPERATION_CODE,
EOCH.BATCH_ID  ,                    
EOCH.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
EOCH.ACTION_CODE 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CEC_HEADERS EOCH
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_HEADERS SOCH WHERE  EOCH.EC_HEADER_ID=SOCH.EC_HEADER_ID 
AND EOCH.GLOBAL_NAME=SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT            
EOCT.TASK_ID ,                      
EOCT.CREATION_DATE,                 
EOCT.CREATED_BY,                    
EOCT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
EOCT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
EOCT.TASK_CODE,                     
EOCT.TASK_NUMBER ,                  
EOCT.TASK_NAME,                     
EOCT.TASK_TYPE_CODE ,               
EOCT.REQUIRED_FOR_ENTRY_FLAG,       
EOCT.ERROR_TASK_FLAG ,              
EOCT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,            
EOCT.TABLE_NAME,                    
EOCT.COLUMN_NAME  ,                 
EOCT.CLEAR_WHEN_INVALID_FLAG ,      
EOCT.TASK_TEXT,                     
EOCT.CHANGE_ORDER_ERROR_CODE,       
EOCT.TASK_EXPLANATION ,             
EOCT.CONSOLIDATE_FLAG ,             
EOCT.AUTO_DELETE_FLAG,              
EOCT.FOR_SOLCAT ,                   
EOCT.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
EOCT.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
EOCT.BATCH_ID,                      
EOCT.CREATE_DATETIME,               
EOCT.ACTION_CODE 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CEC_TASKS EOCT
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_TASKS SOCT WHERE  EOCT.TASK_ID=SOCT.TASK_ID 
AND EOCT.GLOBAL_NAME=SOCT.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT	
SOCH.ORDER_NUMBER,                  
SOCH.EC_HEADER_ID,                  
SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME,                   
SOCH.ERP_HEADER_ID,                 
SOCH.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
SOCH.CREATION_DATE,                 
SOCH.CREATED_BY ,                   
SOCH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
SOCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,  
SOCH.LOAD_CODE,
SOCH.OPERATION_CODE,            
SOCH.BATCH_ID  ,                    
SOCH.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
SOCH.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_HEADERS SOCH
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS SOCOT WHERE SOCOT.EC_HEADER_ID=SOCH.EC_HEADER_ID 
AND SOCOT.GLOBAL_NAME=SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME)
UNION
SELECT 
SOCH.ORDER_NUMBER, 
SOCH.EC_HEADER_ID, 
SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SOCH.ERP_HEADER_ID, 
SOCH.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOCH.CREATION_DATE, 
SOCH.CREATED_BY , 
SOCH.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SOCH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOCH.LOAD_CODE,
SOCH.OPERATION_CODE,            
SOCH.BATCH_ID , 
SOCH.CREATE_DATETIME , 
SOCH.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_HEADERS SOCH
INNER JOIN
$$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS COT
ON COT.EC_HEADER_ID = SOCH.EC_HEADER_ID
AND COT.GLOBAL_NAME = SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE 
SOCH.ERP_HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND CASE WHEN SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN SOCH.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END= NSOT.SS_CODE)

SELECT            
SOCT.TASK_ID ,                      
SOCT.CREATION_DATE,                 
SOCT.CREATED_BY,                    
SOCT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
SOCT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
SOCT.TASK_CODE,                     
SOCT.TASK_NUMBER ,                  
SOCT.TASK_NAME,                     
SOCT.TASK_TYPE_CODE ,               
SOCT.REQUIRED_FOR_ENTRY_FLAG,       
SOCT.ERROR_TASK_FLAG ,              
SOCT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,            
SOCT.TABLE_NAME,                    
SOCT.COLUMN_NAME  ,                 
SOCT.CLEAR_WHEN_INVALID_FLAG ,      
SOCT.TASK_TEXT,                     
SOCT.CHANGE_ORDER_ERROR_CODE,       
SOCT.TASK_EXPLANATION ,             
SOCT.CONSOLIDATE_FLAG ,             
SOCT.AUTO_DELETE_FLAG,              
SOCT.FOR_SOLCAT ,                   
SOCT.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
SOCT.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
SOCT.BATCH_ID,                      
SOCT.CREATE_DATETIME,               
SOCT.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_TASKS SOCT
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS SOCOT  WHERE  SOCOT.TASK_ID =SOCT.TASK_ID AND SOCOT.GLOBAL_NAME=SOCT.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT 
EOCL.CREATION_DATE,                    
EOCL.EC_HEADER_ID,                 
EOCL.EC_LINE_ID ,                  
EOCL.EC_LINE_NUMBER,                    
EOCL.CREATED_BY,               
EOCL.EC_BATCH_ID ,                  
EOCL.EC_PARENT_LINE_ID,               
EOCL.EC_LINK_TO_LINE_ID ,             
EOCL.ERP_LINE_ID ,            
EOCL.INVENTORY_ITEM  ,                       
EOCL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  ,               
EOCL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,                
EOCL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,    
EOCL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,  
EOCL.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,                      
EOCL.WAREHOUSE,              
EOCL.WAREHOUSE_ID ,                    
EOCL.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_ID,                      
EOCL.ORG_ID ,              
EOCL.SOURCE_LINE_ID,  
EOCL.ERP_HEADER_ID ,                      
EOCL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,              
EOCL.GLOBAL_NAME ,                    
EOCL.BATCH_ID,                      
EOCL.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
EOCL.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CEC_LINES EOCL WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_LINES  SOCL   WHERE EOCL.EC_LINE_ID= SOCL.EC_LINE_ID AND
EOCL.GLOBAL_NAME = SOCL.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT 
EX_COL.CREATION_DATE, 
EX_COL.EC_HEADER_ID, 
EX_COL.EC_LINE_ID, 
EX_COL.EC_LINE_NUMBER, 
EX_COL.CREATED_BY, 
EX_COL.EC_BATCH_ID, 
EX_COL.EC_PARENT_LINE_ID, 
EX_COL.EC_LINK_TO_LINE_ID, 
EX_COL.ERP_LINE_ID, 
EX_COL.INVENTORY_ITEM, 
EX_COL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
EX_COL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE, 
EX_COL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
EX_COL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
EX_COL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
EX_COL.WAREHOUSE, 
EX_COL.WAREHOUSE_ID, 
EX_COL.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_ID, 
EX_COL.ORG_ID, 
EX_COL.SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
EX_COL.ERP_HEADER_ID, 
EX_COL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
EX_COL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
EX_COL.BATCH_ID, 
EX_COL.CREATE_DATETIME, 
EX_COL.ACTION_CODE, 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
(SELECT 
SOCL.CREATION_DATE, 
SOCL.EC_HEADER_ID, 
SOCL.EC_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.EC_LINE_NUMBER, 
SOCL.CREATED_BY, 
SOCL.EC_BATCH_ID, 
SOCL.EC_PARENT_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.EC_LINK_TO_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.ERP_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.INVENTORY_ITEM, 
SOCL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SOCL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE, 
SOCL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOCL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
SOCL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SOCL.WAREHOUSE, 
SOCL.WAREHOUSE_ID, 
SOCL.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.ORG_ID, 
SOCL.SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.ERP_HEADER_ID, 
SOCL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOCL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SOCL.BATCH_ID, 
SOCL.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SOCL.ACTION_CODE 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_LINES SOCL
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS SOCOT WHERE SOCOT.EC_LINE_ID=SOCL.EC_LINE_ID 
AND SOCOT.GLOBAL_NAME=SOCL.GLOBAL_NAME)      
UNION
SELECT 
SOCL.CREATION_DATE, 
SOCL.EC_HEADER_ID, 
SOCL.EC_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.EC_LINE_NUMBER, 
SOCL.CREATED_BY, 
SOCL.EC_BATCH_ID, 
SOCL.EC_PARENT_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.EC_LINK_TO_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.ERP_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.INVENTORY_ITEM, 
SOCL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SOCL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE, 
SOCL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOCL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
SOCL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SOCL.WAREHOUSE, 
SOCL.WAREHOUSE_ID, 
SOCL.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.ORG_ID, 
SOCL.SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
SOCL.ERP_HEADER_ID, 
SOCL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOCL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SOCL.BATCH_ID, 
SOCL.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SOCL.ACTION_CODE 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_LINES SOCL,
(SELECT COH.ERP_HEADER_ID,COT.EC_LINE_ID, COT.GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_HEADERS COH, $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_ORDER_TASKS COT
                        WHERE             COT.EC_HEADER_ID = COH.EC_HEADER_ID
                        AND COT.GLOBAL_NAME = COH.GLOBAL_NAME) COHT
WHERE SOCL.EC_LINE_ID = COHT.EC_LINE_ID
            AND                  SOCL.GLOBAL_NAME = COHT.GLOBAL_NAME
AND  NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE 
COHT.ERP_HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND CASE WHEN COHT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN COHT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END= NSOT.SS_CODE)     
) EX_COL
